text.message: They're saying it all depends on me
They're saying I'm in the catbird seat
so you can hear this debauchery occurring
Pizza is REALLLLL good until the 4 rolls
everyone promise to not take army or road?
Bro takes his whole turn to convince yall hes losing except this time hes actually right
for real though, what's the sickness?
Nick has the best set up
If u trade nick here im dead
Idc if u dont trade me
Just acknowledge hes doing well too
Blanch choose a good setup challenge (impossible)
i can't help having a low IQ
i can trade wheat but it won't be free
I give a future free ore
Give nick a panera gift card while were at it
what is your go to panera order?
That was before the 28 card mono
Pizza tell you where to cross the street too?
Nick just filed his taxes in Nov bc you told him to
If u trade nick im going to bed
